svg.aria-label: BookedAI Master Roadmap from 2026-04-11 Phase 0 reset through 2026-06-07 Phase 23 closeout, organized into five workstream swim lanes with milestones M-01 through M-11 and a hard GO-LIVE LOCK on 2026-04-30
svg.title: BookedAI Master Roadmap — 8 Weeks to Production Scale
svg.desc: Workstream swim-lane roadmap covering 9 weekly buckets from Apr 11 through Jun 7 2026. Lanes: Pre-Go-Live, Go-Live Sprint, Post-Go-Live, Communication Layer, Tenant Runtimes. Milestones M-01 demo (29 Apr), M-02 GO-LIVE LOCK (30 Apr), M-03 widget on first SME (10 May), M-04 wallet/Stripe continuity (17 May), M-05 tenant revenue proof (24 May), M-06 multi-tenant template + SMS (31 May), M-07 CI + observability (7 Jun), M-08 total project completion (7 Jun), and overlay milestones M-09 WhatsApp outbound (4-10 May), M-10 iMessage feasibility (11-17 May), M-11 SMS adapter (25-31 May).

g.text: Key inflection point — all 3 tenants live
Telegram primary · search → match → book → portal → care
Telegram primary · WhatsApp QR-bridge bonus only
pitch.bookedai.au · roadmap.bookedai.au — BookedAI 2026 · master roadmap synced 2026-04-27
